tasks.description: Sparkplug B payload spike: verify sparkplug-payload works with Bun runtime and compilation
steps: bun add sparkplug-payload
Create test/unit/spike/sparkplug-payload.test.ts with encode/decode round-trip tests
Test NBIRTH payload with 3 metric types (Int32, Double, Boolean)
Test DDATA payload with metric aliases
Test NDEATH payload with bdSeq
Test 64-bit timestamp preservation
Run bun test test/unit/spike/ — must pass
Verify bun build --compile succeeds with sparkplug-payload bundled
If sparkplug-payload fails: try @jcoreio/sparkplug-payload or raw protobufjs
Commit: phase-7: spike — verify sparkplug-payload works with Bun

tasks.description: Real MQTT client wrapper: extract MqttClientInterface types to shared module, implement real mqtt.js wrapper, update mqtt-consumer to use shared module
steps: Create src/core/mqtt-types.ts — move MqttClientInterface, MqttClientOptions, MqttMessageEvent from mqtt-consumer.ts
Extend MqttClientInterface with publish() and setWill() methods
Create src/core/mqtt-client.ts implementing RealMqttClient wrapping mqtt npm package
Support: connect, subscribe, unsubscribe, publish, onMessage/Connect/Error/Close/Reconnect, disconnect, setWill, TLS, clean session
Update mqtt-consumer.ts imports to use shared types from mqtt-types.ts
Update mqtt-consumer.ts createDefaultMqttClient() to use RealMqttClient
Write tests in test/unit/core/mqtt-client.test.ts
Run bun test — ALL tests pass including all existing mqtt-consumer tests
Commit: phase-7: extract shared MQTT client wrapper from mqtt-consumer

tasks.description: Sparkplug B codec: metric type mapping, FNV-1a alias computation, payload encode/decode for all Sparkplug B message types (NBIRTH, NDEATH, DBIRTH, DDEATH, DDATA, NDATA, NCMD)
steps: Create src/hub/sparkplug-codec.ts
Implement fieldValueToSparkplugType() — FieldValue to Sparkplug B data type mapping per PRD §9 table
Implement FNV-1a 32-bit hash function
Implement computeMetricAlias(deviceId, metricName) — hash mod 2^31
Implement resolveAliases(deviceId, metricNames) — with collision resolution (increment until unique)
Implement encodeNBirth() with bdSeq, properties, control metrics, agent metrics
Implement encodeNDeath() with bdSeq
Implement encodeDBirth() with full metric definitions, aliases, types, device properties
Implement encodeDDeath()
Implement encodeDData() with alias-based metrics (no names, just alias + value + timestamp)
Implement encodeNData() with seq and agent self-metrics
Implement decodeNCmd() for parsing rebirth commands
Write tests in test/unit/hub/sparkplug-codec.test.ts — all type mappings, alias determinism, collision resolution, encode/decode round-trips for every message type
Run bun test — all pass
Commit: phase-7: add Sparkplug B codec — payload encoding, type mapping, metric aliases

tasks.description: Hub link session manager: MQTT connection, Sparkplug B edge node lifecycle (NBIRTH/NDEATH/DBIRTH/DDEATH/DDATA/NDATA/NCMD), sequence numbering, device tracking, rebirth handling
steps: Create src/hub/hub-link.ts with HubLink class and HubLinkConfig interface
Implement topic builder: spBv1.0/{group_id}/{msgType}/{edge_node_id}[/{device_id}]
Implement constructor with MqttClientInterface DI (for testing)
Implement start(): setWill(NDEATH with bdSeq), connect, publish NBIRTH, subscribe to NCMD topic
Implement registerDevice(DeviceInfo): store device info for later DBIRTH
Implement publishDeviceBirth(deviceId, metrics): DBIRTH to correct topic, compute aliases
Implement publishDeviceData(deviceId, metrics): DDATA with alias-based encoding, auto-DBIRTH on first call
Implement publishDeviceDeath(deviceId): DDEATH
Implement publishNodeData(metrics): NDATA with agent self-metrics
Implement handleNCmd(payload): parse NCMD, handle Node Control/Rebirth
Implement rebirth(): re-publish NBIRTH + all DBIRTHs, reset seq to 0
Implement stop(): DDEATH for all known devices, disconnect
Implement seq numbering: 0-255 wrapping, reset on NBIRTH
bdSeq: start at 0 for MVP, TODO for SQLite persistence
Write tests in test/unit/hub/hub-link.test.ts with mock MQTT client
Run bun test — all pass
Commit: phase-7: add Hub link session manager — Sparkplug B edge node lifecycle

tasks.description: MQTT output plugin: Sparkplug B mode (via Hub link) and plain MQTT mode. Zod schema, plugin factory registration, schema registry entry.
steps: Create src/plugins/outputs/mqtt.ts with MqttOutputConfigSchema and MqttOutput class
Implement connect(): connect via own client (plain mode) or validate hub link reference (sparkplug mode)
Implement write() for Sparkplug mode: group metrics by _device_id tag, call hubLink.publishDeviceData()
Implement write() for plain MQTT mode: encode metrics as JSON, publish to topic template
Implement close(): disconnect own client (not hub link's)
Add MqttOutput to OUTPUT_FACTORIES in plugin-factory.ts
Add outputs.mqtt to PLUGIN_SCHEMAS in plugin-schemas.ts
Update config-init.ts template to include commented MQTT output example
Write tests in test/unit/plugins/outputs/mqtt.test.ts — sparkplug mode, plain mode, config validation
Run bun test — all pass
Commit: phase-7: add MQTT output plugin — Sparkplug B and plain MQTT modes

tasks.description: Pipeline integration: wire Hub link into PipelineRuntime and plugin factory. Extend [agent.hub] config schema. Add _device_id tag injection in accumulator.
steps: Extend [agent.hub] schema in config.ts: add enabled (default false), heartbeat_interval (default 30s)
Extend PipelineOptions with optional hubLink: HubLink
Update buildPipeline() in plugin-factory.ts: create HubLink when hub.enabled, pass to MQTT output instances with sparkplug:true
Update ChannelAccumulator in accumulator.ts: when input alias is set, inject _device_id tag on all metrics
Update PipelineRuntime.start(): start hub link after output.connect(), before inputs start; register devices from input aliases
Update PipelineRuntime.stop(): stop hub link after pipeline drains, before plugin close()
Write test/integration/hub-link-pipeline.test.ts: full pipeline with hub link mock → verify NBIRTH, DBIRTH on first data, DDATA, shutdown sequence
Run bun test — ALL tests pass including all existing tests
Commit: phase-7: wire Hub link into pipeline — lifecycle, device registration, _device_id tagging

tasks.description: Hub link heartbeat: periodic NDATA publication with agent self-metrics (uptime, event loop lag, buffer length)
steps: Add heartbeat timer to HubLink (configurable interval from heartbeatIntervalMs)
Accept optional StatsCollector in HubLink constructor for reading self-metrics
On heartbeat tick: read uptime_seconds, event_loop_lag_ms, buffer_total_length from stats
Encode as NDATA payload, publish to spBv1.0/{group_id}/NDATA/{edge_node_id}
Timer starts in start(), stops in stop()
Write tests: heartbeat fires at interval, NDATA published with correct metrics, timer cancelled on stop
Run bun test — all pass
Commit: phase-7: add Hub link heartbeat — periodic NDATA with agent self-metrics

tasks.description: Phase 7 integration tests and cleanup: comprehensive Sparkplug B lifecycle tests, multi-device, sequence numbering, hub-disabled path, README/docs update
steps: Create test/integration/sparkplug-lifecycle.test.ts: full lifecycle (start → NBIRTH → DBIRTH → DDATA → rebirth → shutdown)
Test multi-device: two inputs with different aliases → separate DBIRTH/DDATA on correct topics
Test sequence numbering: seq increments, wraps at 255, resets on rebirth
Create test/integration/mqtt-output-pipeline.test.ts: config-driven pipeline with MQTT output
Test hub disabled: pipeline works normally when hub.enabled = false
Ensure plugin-schemas.ts includes outputs.mqtt
Ensure config-init templates include Hub + MQTT output examples
Update README.md with Hub configuration section
Run full bun test — zero failures
Commit: phase-7: add Sparkplug B integration tests and cleanup
